label: Open Positions
description: Open prediction market positions with entry price, current price, P&L, and expiry.

0.4.note: No any or @ts-ignore in widget file.

0.5.note: No lib/mocks/ imports in widget file.

0.6.note: TableWidget handles loading implicitly; data immediately available from sync context.

1.4.note: PredictionPosition has no clientId — client narrowing deferred.

1.5.note: Strategy filter applied via scopeStrategyIds deterministic subset.

1.6.note: Empty strategyIds returns all open positions.

1.7.note: No lib/mocks/ in widget file; MOCK_POSITIONS in context.

l1.notes: All L1 checks pass (1.4 partial — schema gap).

3.1.note: Live ✓: real positions. Paper ✓: simulated label added. Batch ✓: read-only table, no order entry.

3.2.note: Context uses isPaper to tag positions with simulated label.

3.5.note: Paper: positions show simulated label; P&L values still displayed.

l3.notes: Agent prep complete. Human: 3.3 N/A (read-only table); 3.4 verify batch indicator if applicable.

4.1.note: No onClick handlers in this widget — pure display table.

l4.notes: Agent prep complete. Human: 4.7 column visibility toggle (enableColumnVisibility=false — N/A); 4.8 scroll within widget bounds.

5.1.note: Positions view for all prediction strategies: PRED_POLY_ARB_SCE_1M, PRED_BTC_CEFI_ARB_SCE_5M, PREDICTION_POLY_ML_DIR_EVT_4H.

l5.notes: Agent prep complete. Human: verify positions appear after trade placement via pred-trade-panel.

7.1.note: No hardcoded hex/rgb. text-emerald-400/text-red-400 are Tailwind semantic tokens (not hex), pass L7.1 scope.

7.3.note: 138 lines — within limit. pnlColour and categoryLabel are small helpers.

7.4.note: PredOpenPositionsWidget PascalCase; file kebab-case; all hooks useCamelCase.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: columns array is defined at module level (stable ref), not inside render.

8.3.note: Uses Badge, TableWidget shared primitives; ColumnDef from @tanstack/react-table.

8.4.note: Agent: no bare img/input/div-onClick. Human: keyboard navigation through sortable columns.

l8.notes: 8.1 deferred pending globals.css token for 10px/9px compact density. Human: 8.4 keyboard + 8.5 resize at minW=6.

keepSeparate.rationale: Positions table is independent — no cross-widget selection coupling needed; peer to pred-portfolio-kpis.

relationships.notes: Peer to pred-portfolio-kpis and pred-settled-positions; all derive from same openPositions/settledPositions context data.

dataContract.notes: Production: position updates pushed via WebSocket on fill/settlement events.

gaps: Sorting on sharesHeld/totalStaked/unrealisedPnl — resolutionDate sort not wired
coverage.notes: Columns: Market, Side, Shares, Entry/Now, Staked, Unr. P&L, Resolves.

knownIssues.description: Client-level filter not wired — PredictionPosition has no clientId field.

findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: pred-open-positions-widget.tsx — text-[10px] and text-[9px] arbitrary font sizes for compact table density
findings.fix: Applied text-micro (10px) and text-nano (9px) tokens from globals.css (2026-04-21).
